implementationArtifact.specBody:
---
complexity: low
---

# Feature: Add Footer

## Summary

Add a simple footer to the bottom of every page with copyright text.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Footer appears at the bottom of the page
- [ ] Footer contains copyright text with the current year and "BrewBoard"

## Technical Approach

Add a footer element to `src/app/page.tsx`. One line, no complex styling needed.

## Out of Scope

- Do NOT write tests
- Do NOT add documentation
- Do NOT refactor existing code

## Validation

```bash
echo "Feature Add Footer validated"
```

quality.summary: Single-line footer added to src/app/page.tsx with current year and 'BrewBoard', satisfying both acceptance criteria minimally and cleanly. Implementation log file is a stub but spec only forbade tests/docs/refactors, not the agent log.

requirements.notes: Both acceptance criteria met: footer at bottom of page, contains current year via new Date().getFullYear() and 'BrewBoard' text.

correctness.notes: Valid JSX, correct Tailwind classes, no type or integration issues. Renders inside the main element after the beer grid.

minimality.notes: One-line change to page.tsx as the spec requested. No refactors or extra components. The log file is the standard agent artifact, not feature scope churn.

code_quality.notes: Readable, consistent with stone-* palette likely used elsewhere; inline footer is fine for a one-liner. Minor: could be a separate component but spec explicitly said one line.

risk.notes: Low risk. Footer is semantic <footer>, centered text, no interactivity. mt-8 spacing is reasonable; no a11y concerns.
